summary: This document is a template for assessing and reporting medical device incidents within the company's Quality Management System. It outlines the regulatory criteria for determining reportable events under EU MDR 2017/745 and references internal SOPs for vigilance procedures. The form serves as a standardized tool for compliance teams to evaluate potential safety issues and determine if they require reporting to competent authorities.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/7. Administratives/3. QMS Documentation/7. Post Market (Templates)/Incident Assessment Form.docx
sniff_test_notes: Document is a template form; references EU MDR regulations which may need alignment with UK MHRA standards for this UK startup.
